title: FloristryWarehouse Eucalyptus Bush Green Artificial 52cm/20 Inches
features: Five stems of realistic green Eucalyptus
The stems are wired for arrangement and merge into one for easy potting or displaying in a vase
Ideal for adding some strong, dark colour to winter arrangements
description: Five stems of realistic green Eucalyptus, each comprising four further stems of green foliage with light green heads. 52cm/20 inches tall overall. The stems are wired for arrangement and merge into one for easy potting or displaying in a vase. Ideal for adding some strong, dark colour to winter arrangements and for dressing functions, weddings and for other other craft uses. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
